turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Reporting a Lost Item or Filing a Minor Police Report. “ • “Hi, I’ve lost my wallet at the train station and I would like to make a report.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright. I’m sorry to hear that—can you tell me when you last remember having the wallet at the train station?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: When I Went to buy the ticket

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Okay. So it was when you were buying a ticket—about what time and date did this happen?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright. Just to confirm, that was on December 12th at around  in the afternoon—can you tell me which train station this happened at?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Okay. Thanks—was the wallet lost inside the station building or on the platform area?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright. Thanks for clarifying—can you describe the wallet for me, like the color or what was inside it?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes it is pink than have my ID inside

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Okay. A pink wallet with your ID inside—was there any cash, bank cards, or other important items in it?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes there was bank cards but not Money

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright. Thanks for letting me know—have you already contacted your bank to block those cards, or not yet?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, of course. Thanks so much.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright. You’re welcome—we’ve noted everything for the report. If the wallet is found, we’ll contact you, and feel free to follow up anytime. Take care.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright. I hope so too—bye, and take care.
